text: Dashboard table columns 1-4 (Last updated, Project/customer, Product/region, Address) used align-middle while columns 5-11 used align-top. When document columns (SignedPdfsTableCell, StatusCell) stretch the row height, the align-middle cells appear to have large blank regions above and below their content — visible as a 'big white space' between the project and product columns. Fix: change all td elements to align-top for consistent layout. Never mix align-middle with align-top in the same table when cells can have variable heights.
issue: Big white space between Project column and Product column in dashboard table
